exam_name: SEE Part 3 — Representation, Practices and Procedures (EA Part 3)

testing_centers.notes: Prometric test centers only. Testing season: May 1 through February 28 each year. No testing in March and April while IRS updates exam content.

id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID required (passport, driver's license, or state ID). Name on ID must match Prometric registration exactly. Secondary ID may also be required.
exam_rules: Closed-book. No personal items in exam room. On-screen calculator provided. Scratch paper provided by testing center. No phones or electronic devices. Monitored by proctor.
renewal_options: All 3 SEE parts must be passed to apply for Enrolled Agent (EA) status with the IRS. EA designation requires 72 hours of continuing education (CE) per 3-year renewal cycle, with a minimum of 16 hours per year (including 2 hours of ethics each year). EA renewal fee applies every 3 years.

retake_policy.notes: Unlimited retakes allowed within a testing season (May 1 – Feb 28). Full $206 Prometric fee required for each attempt. All 3 parts must be passed within a 2-year rolling window: once Part 1 is passed, Parts 2 and 3 must be passed within 2 years, otherwise passed parts must be retaken.

official_study_resources.title: IRS Enrolled Agent Information
official_study_resources.notes: Official IRS page with SEE exam content specifications and candidate information bulletin

aliases: see part 3 representation practices and procedures ea part 3
